docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIDOVICH, DOHNEY AS TO DEFENDANT QASSRAWI, ALI K.  AKA ALI QASSRAWI DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE
